title: How to request an assisted sorting session for the first time
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d6pki","text":"Step by step protocol to create a PPMS account and to find the \"Preliminary Sorting Discussion\" form.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: If you already have a PPMS account, please proceed to the step 6 . If not, access the following link: https://ppms.embl.de/start/
Click on Flow Cytometry Core Facility

Next, you will be prompted to enter your credentials. On the "Username" field, please fill with your username without the "@embl.de" (don't use your full email). After that, just use your regular login password

You will be brought to a small form where you can fill the important information for the service billing and once submitted, the staff will receive an account creation request. Once we accept it, you should receive a confirmation by email. 🙂
To book a instrument, refer to the How to book a sorting slot in PPMS protocol

Facility staff will receive your order, accept it and will check if everything is OK. If potential questions arises, the staff will send them to the user or will ask to schedule a meeting. When all the questions are clarified, the staff will give the users rights to book the instrument(s).
Once you are done filling all the required information, click on "Submit Form".

Optional: Attach the order to a project if available Select a financial account for the order or keep the default one (Note that this service is not going to be charged!) Add 1 to the "Quantity" box for the Preliminary Cell Sorting Request Click on "Order".
On the upper tabs, click on "ORDER"
Click on Flow Cytometry Core Facility
creator: Daniel Gimenes
